mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the CPIAUCSL (inflation) signals central bank intervention via rate hikes, which compresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 320 and FEDFUNDS > 4.2%

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) indicates robust labor market conditions that support corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns are negative in > 50% of periods with PAYEMS growth > 150k

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) reflects expanding manufacturing activity that boosts corporate profits, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns are negative in > 40% of instances where INDPRO > 103.5

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating housing starts (HOUST) signal improved consumer confidence and construction activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns are negative in > 50% of periods with HOUST > 1350

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer spending (RSAFS) combined with low unemployment (UNRATE) indicates sustained demand pressures that push equity valuations higher, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns are negative in > 50% of instances where RSAFS > 720k and UNRATE < 4.2%

mechanism_narrative: A monetary tightening cycle (FEDFUNDS > 4.5%) combined with slowing GDP growth (GDPC1 < 2.0% QoQ) creates headwinds for equity markets, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns are positive in > 50% of periods with FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and GDPC1 < 2.0%

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate (UNRATE) signals tighter labor markets that increase wage pressures and corporate costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns are positive in > 50% of periods with UNRATE < 4.1%

mechanism_narrative: Weak industrial production (INDPRO) indicates underutilized capacity and slowing economic activity, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns are positive in > 50% of instances where INDPRO < 103.0
